channel.title: svn on JensRantil
channel.description: Recent content in svn on JensRantil

item.title: Replacing a folder in Subversion
item.description: Replacing a folder in Subversion So you have an external library foo version 1.0 that you have committed to your Subversion repository together with your code. Let us for simplicity say that your external library is situated in its own folder. One day you realize that there is a new version 2.0 of foo released. You download it and since there was a while ago a lot of the file structure in the foo project has changed.
